iti61:1.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti61:1.3:
"There are these three eyes. Which three? The eye of flesh, the divine eye
, and the eye of discernment. These are the three eyes."
The eye of flesh, the eye divine, the eye of discernment unsurpassed: these three eyes were taught by the Superlative Person.
iti61:1.4: The arising of the eye of flesh is the path to the eye divine. When knowledge arises, the eye of discernment unsurpassed: whoever gains this eye is — from all suffering — set free.
iti61:1.5: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
